Title: Zerner, Henri Thomas
Overview: Curator, Prints, Fogg Museum, Harvard University. Lic es Letters (1961), Doctor of Fine Arts from University of Paris (1969). Curator, Painting and Graphic Arts Museum, Prints and Drawing Museum, Rhode Island School of Design (1965-1972).
Selected Bibliography: Ecoles de Fontainebleau, Gravures. Paris: Arts et Metiers Graphiques, 1969.
Archives: • Henri Zerner papers, 1961-1967, bulk 1965-1967, Road Island School of Design Archives. http://www.riamco.org/render?eadid=US-RPD-23.3.6.2, 23.3.6.2.
